rawAssistant: Can't rightly put my finger on it, but them stone monsters have been actin' up somethin' fierce lately. Rocks shakin', walls crackin', and them glowin' lowlanders... I reckon they're all connected somehow. You might want to take a gander at the north road, see if you can find any answers.
